title: Caucasian Women and Endometriosis: 7 Herbal Creams for Pain Relief
description: Vitex agnus-castus creams have been studied for their potential benefits in alleviating symptoms of endometriosis. The cream is made from the extract of the chaste tree, which contains compounds like flavonoids, terpenes, and iridoid glycosides. These constituents may help to regulate menstrual cycles, reduce inflammation, and alleviate pain associated with endometriosis. If you're considering using Vitex agnus-castus creams for endometriosis, start by consulting with a healthcare prof...
